topic.title: Create New Estimates
topic.shortdesc: Use the Cost Estimator to generate a personalized college cost estimate by entering student and financial information.

steps.step:
Navigate to the Cost Estimator > Estimates > New Estimate.
Result: The Estimator page displays.
Accept the Terms of Use agreement and click Get Started.
Enter the required information on the Profile page and click Next.
Complete the Status page and click Next.
Provide household financial information on the Finance page and click Next.

Enter your details on the About You page and click Next.
Result: Review the available tabs.
